All foundation tasks complete; scaffold builds and the trait boundaries are in place.

Toolchain pinned + documented (docs/TOOLING.md, requirements.txt), tool discovery in core::tools, 'lob doctor' preflight implemented and verified; RC low-pass SKiDL circuit emits a clean netlist end-to-end.

Toolchain pinned + documented (docs/TOOLING.md, requirements.txt), tool discovery in core::tools, 'lob doctor' preflight implemented and verified; RC low-pass SKiDL circuit emits a clean netlist end-to-end.

SKiDL runner (core::skidl::SkidlRunner) shells out via the venv python, runs in a scratch work_dir so artifacts stay out of the repo, captures netlist + ERC report, surfaces missing-interpreter/non-zero-exit as StageError (not panic). Wired as stage 1 of 'lob run'; verified end-to-end on examples/rc_lowpass.py. 10 unit tests, fmt+clippy clean.

core::netlist parses the KiCad S-expr netlist into the Circuit model (first CircuitSource producer): parts (refdes/value/footprint/libsource) + nets (name + pins), deterministically sorted. Self-contained S-expr reader, no new deps. Wired as stage 2 of 'lob run' (parses the real generated netlist: 2 parts, 3 nets). 14 unit tests incl. round-trip on an RC netlist fixture; fmt+clippy clean.

core::spice generates a SPICE deck from the Circuit (pinâ†’net inversion, GNDâ†’0, R/C/L support, IN/OUT/GND harness), runs 'ngspice -b', and parses the AC response (freq, vdb). AcResult exposes passband gain + interpolated -3dB cutoff. Verified: 601-point sweep on the RC filter. 9 spice/units tests.

core::verify::check_rc_cutoff computes analytic 1/(2piRC) from parsed R/C values and asserts the simulated -3dB cutoff within a configurable tolerance. End-to-end: expected 1000.97 Hz vs simulated 1000.96 Hz (0.001% err). Failure path unit-tested (wrong cutoff â†’ failed outcome w/ diff). Non-single-RC â†’ skipped.

Completed the 6-stage Phase 0 loop. validate (core::validate): surfaces ERC WARNING/ERROR lines as structured findings, fails only on ERC errors. bom (core::bom): groups parts by value+footprint, qty+refdes, CSV + aligned table, flags missing footprints. Wired into 'lob run' in DESIGN order skidlâ†’parseâ†’validateâ†’simulateâ†’verifyâ†’bom with per-stage report + non-zero exit. Verified end-to-end on RC filter: all 6 stages pass, exit 0, BOM CSV written. 30 core tests, fmt+clippy clean.

Implemented: components carry their SPICE model, resolved FROM the component (core::symbols reads the KiCad symbol's Sim.Device/Name/Library/Pins â€” which SKiDL's netlist drops â€” and the .sp subckt terminal order). core::spice::SpiceModel + generic generate_ac_deck instantiates subckt (X-line + .include) or primitive (R/C/L) with supply rails, ZERO per-device conditionals. Verified: RC via primitive path, op-amp via the real kicad_builtin_opamp subckt, both through the same generic path. S-expr reader promoted to shared core::sexpr.

Non-inverting op-amp gain stage (examples/opamp_noninv.py, Rf=9k/Rg=1k -> gain 10) passes the full 6-stage loop: sim uses the component's real op-amp subckt (resolved from the symbol, not hardcoded), verify checks 1+Rf/Rg topologically (expected 10.000x / 20dB, simulated 9.995x -> 0.05% err, the real op-amp's finite-gain deviation). Second demo circuit exercises the loop on a different topology + active device. Built on okm.8.

Phase 0 complete: the full 6-stage loop (SKiDL -> parse -> validate -> simulate -> verify -> BOM) is proven end-to-end on two textbook circuits with known-good answers â€” RC low-pass (cutoff vs 1/2piRC, 0.001%) and non-inverting op-amp (gain vs 1+Rf/Rg, 0.05% via the component's real subckt model). Local-only, self-verifying, non-zero exit on failure. Stretch task P0.11 (layout scaffolding) superseded by the Layout epic's kicad-ipc-rs task (j54.5).

Dolt-backed parts library schema + read/write interface shipped. core::parts: parts/part_pins/part_ratings (mpn as natural key, citations via cited_page); PartsLibrary shells out to the dolt CLI (init + schema + transactional upsert + JSON reads + versioning commit), matching the project's shell-out pattern. PartRecord/PinRecord/RatingRecord, verified_by_human gate field, default cross-project dir (LOB_PARTS_DIR override). 'lob parts list/show/add/verify' CLI. Verified end-to-end (LM13700) + unit + real-dolt round-trip test. Unblocks okm.3 (fetch_datasheet), okm.7 (MPN resolution), okm.9 (SPICE models).

MPN resolution shipped. model::Part carries mpn (extracted from the netlist's MPN field); PartsLibrary::resolve_circuit returns per-part ResolutionStatus (NoMpn/Unknown/Unverified/Verified) against the library; 'lob parts resolve <circuit>'. Verified end-to-end: a SKiDL circuit with MPN=LM13700 resolves âš  unverified â†’ âś“ verified. Unblocks zya.2 (Mouser pricing by resolved MPN) and okm.4 (verification gate). 41 core tests.
